# Cognis Group

Last updated: 2026-04-14

> Cognis Group is an AI company that builds, deploys, and governs AI systems that permanently transform organizations. Three core practices: AI Strategy & Advisory, AI Training & Workforce Development, and AI Agent & Automation Engineering. Quod Tango Muto — what we touch, we change.

## Core content

- [Homepage](https://cognis.group/): Full overview of capabilities, team, and engagement model
- [About Us](https://cognis.group/about-us): Mission, founding story, and operating principles
- [Services](https://cognis.group/our-services): Three AI practice areas
- [Blog / Insights](https://cognis.group/blog): Enterprise AI deployment, governance, ROI, and workforce development
- [Contact](https://cognis.group/contact): Start an engagement with Cognis Group

## Case Studies

- [Case Studies Landing](https://cognis.group/case-studies): Selected Cognis Group engagements from strategy to governed production.
- [MarketSage: AI sales intelligence platform](https://cognis.group/case-studies/marketsage): 0 to v1 in 14 weeks — reference build for our agent engineering practice.
- [Claims processing: 14 days to <48 hours](https://cognis.group/case-studies/claims-processing-automation): Governed agent system cut claims cycle time by 85% in a multi-country financial services group (anonymised).
- [AI training: 6 months in 6 weeks](https://cognis.group/case-studies/ai-training-programme): 3,200 staff trained and EU AI Act Article 4 literacy evidenced in six weeks (anonymised).

## How We Work

- [Methodology](https://cognis.group/how-we-work): Our six-phase engagement methodology — Discovery, Assessment, Strategy, Build, Deploy, Govern — designed to ship production AI rather than stall at pilot.

## Services

- [AI Strategy & Advisory](https://cognis.group/our-services/ai-strategy-advisory): AI readiness assessments, use case identification, and deployment roadmaps from strategy to measurable business impact.
- [AI Training & Workforce Development](https://cognis.group/our-services/ai-training-workforce-development): AI literacy programs for C-suite to frontline teams — mindset, capability, and governance discipline at scale.
- [AI Agent & Automation Engineering](https://cognis.group/our-services/ai-agent-automation-engineering): Custom AI agents and intelligent automation workflows that eliminate bottlenecks and scale output.

## Insights

- [Why Most Enterprise AI Strategies Fail Before They Start](https://cognis.group/blog/why-most-enterprise-ai-strategies-fail-before-they-start): Common failure modes in enterprise AI adoption.
- [Building AI Agents That Actually Ship](https://cognis.group/blog/building-ai-agents-that-actually-ship): From proof of concept to production-grade agent deployment.
- [AI Governance Is Not Optional](https://cognis.group/blog/ai-governance-is-not-optional): Building governance before deployment, not after.
- [The Real ROI of AI](https://cognis.group/blog/the-real-roi-of-ai): How to measure AI impact beyond efficiency metrics.
- [Making Your Workforce AI-Ready](https://cognis.group/blog/making-your-workforce-ai-ready): Developing AI literacy from boardroom to operations.
- [AI-Native Operations for African Enterprises](https://cognis.group/blog/ai-native-operations-for-african-enterprises): How African enterprises can leapfrog into AI-native operations.

## About

Cognis Group Limited is registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (Lagos, Nigeria). Founded 2025 by Supreme Oyewumi. Serves organizations across Africa, Europe, and the Americas.

Motto: Quod Tango Muto — "What we touch, we change."

Contact: consulting@cognis.group | +2349080001101

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://cognis.group/privacy-policy): How Cognis Group collects, uses, and protects personal data (NDPA 2023, GDPR-aligned).
- [Terms of Service](https://cognis.group/terms): Website use, IP, liability, and Nigerian governing law.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://cognis.group/faq): Answers on engagement shape, pricing, data sovereignty, and the frameworks we align to.
